parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'z-ai/glm-4.5-air:free', max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content:
'You are a senior automation consultant for Phoenix Automation. Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown. ' +
'Allowed service_tier values: starter-build, growth-build, scale-build, retainer, agency-retainer. ' +
'Read these assessment notes and identify the best 1 to 3 practical automations. ' +
'Return JSON keys: scope_summary, service_tier, automation_count, automation_1_name, automation_1_description, automation_2_name, automation_2_description, automation_3_name, automation_3_description, tools_required.\n\n' +
'Client: ' + $('Prepare Client Data').item.json.company_name + '\n' +
'Industry: ' + $('Prepare Client Data').item.json.industry + '\n' +
'Notes: ' + $('Prepare Client Data').item.json.call_notes
 }] }) }}

fields.Precall Brief: QA smoke test prospect for workflow validation.
fields.call_notes: Client runs a US bookkeeping firm. They manually copy website leads into Airtable, send Gmail follow-ups, and create ClickUp onboarding tasks. They want lead intake, proposal, and onboarding automated with clear owner review before anything goes live.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { project_status: "scope_review", scope_of_work: $json.scope_summary || "", scope_summary: $json.scope_summary || "", service_tier: $json.service_tier || "starter-build", automation_count: Number($json.automation_count || 1), automation_1_name: $json.automation_1_name || "", automation_1_description: $json.automation_1_description || "", automation_2_name: $json.automation_2_name || "", automation_2_description: $json.automation_2_description || "", automation_3_name: $json.automation_3_name || "", automation_3_description: $json.automation_3_description || "", tools_required: Array.isArray($json.tools_required) ? $json.tools_required.join(", ") : ($json.tools_required || "") } }) }}

parameters.subject: =?? Scope ready for review: {{ $("Parse Scope JSON").item.json.company_name }}
parameters.html:
=
 

?? Scope Ready for Review

Phoenix Automation ? Internal Notification
Company {{ $json.fields.company_name }}
Slug {{ $json.fields.client_slug }}
Tier {{ $json.fields.service_tier }}
Automations {{ $json.fields.automation_count }}
Tools required {{ $json.fields.tools_required }}
Automation 1 {{ $json.fields.automation_1_name ? ($json.fields.automation_1_name + ($json.fields.automation_1_description ? " ? " + $json.fields.automation_1_description : "")) : "" }}
Automation 2 {{ $json.fields.automation_2_name ? ($json.fields.automation_2_name + ($json.fields.automation_2_description ? " ? " + $json.fields.automation_2_description : "")) : "" }}
Automation 3 {{ $json.fields.automation_3_name ? ($json.fields.automation_3_name + ($json.fields.automation_3_description ? " ? " + $json.fields.automation_3_description : "")) : "" }}
Summary {{ $json.fields.scope_summary }}

Approve Scope

This email was sent automatically by Phoenix Automation workflows  |  phoenixautomation.ai

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ records: [{ fields: { workflow: "[PA] Scoping Agent", event: "scope_generated", client: $("Parse Scope JSON").item.json.client_slug || "", run_at: new Date().toISOString(), timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), status: "completed" } }] }) }}

parameters.formDescription: Fill this in immediately after an assessment call. Takes 2 minutes.

values.placeholder: What does the client do? What manual tasks eat their time? What tools do they use? How big is their team? Any urgency or blockers mentioned?
